instruction: Rewrite the content to meet insurance regulatory and compliance standards.

input.draft_text:
What Investment Plans Can I Buy for a 3-Year Tenure?
While financial experts advise that an investment should be made for a minimum of five years, there are often times and situations when one needs a faster and quicker investment plan. While people realise that discipline and patience are key aspects of a fruitful investment, there are times in life when you investing for so long is not a luxury that you can enjoy. If you have just started your investment journey, or want to build a corpus for an upcoming expense, and want to make a short-term investment, then a 3-year tenure is also a decent investment option. Here are some investment plans that offer maximum returns in 3 years:
Investment plans that offer maximum returns in 3 years
If you have any short-term financial plan, you may require finances in a short time. One popular way to accumulate a good amount of money is by investing in an investment plan for 3-year plan that yields maximum returns. Some of the investment plans for 3-years are mentioned here for your reference-
The Savings Account Plan
When you wish for your money to grow along with the security of liquidity, a savings account is your go-to option. A savings account can be opened in any banking institution. It is purposely opened with the aim of saving money for long-term uses. To help the customer to save, some banks also restrict the number of withdrawals each month. A savings account offers a fair rate of interest which is calculated every month on the minimum balance maintained in that month.
Fixed Deposits
Thanks to the lucrative features, Indian investors prefer investing in fixed deposits. Being one of the safest investment plans, a fixed deposit ensures a fixed return over a period of time. Suppose you fix INR 10 lakh for a period of 3 years with an ROI of 6.5%. The total amount you get post-maturity is INR 13,80,420. The security and stability make FDs one of the investment options. Those who have a low-risk appetite can definitely go with this investment plan. Tip: To gain maximum benefit, make sure you do not break the FD before maturity.
Debt Mutual Funds1
A debt mutual fund investment like that of a liquid fund is quite helpful for people looking for a short-term investment plan. The investment period of a liquid mutual fund is 91 days. The various reasons why this investment plan attracts people are its low-risk appetite and good returns. You may not expect very high returns on liquid funds, but it is definitely one of the investment options for those wanting low risks and average returns.
Gold Investment
Be it Generation X, Y, or now Z. Gold is always considered an asset. Looking at the past trends, you’ll realise it has offered more than 20% returns2. Investing in gold is one of the wisest choices because it remains largely unaffected by the market crisis. Purchasing gold not only acts as one of the investment options but can also be a support pillar in times of financial emergency. So, if you are looking for a safe bet with high returns, choose gold investment today.
ELSS (Equity Linked Savings Scheme)
Equity Linked Savings Scheme is a mutual fund investment where you can invest either in SIPs or lump-sum amounts. With as low as INR 500, investment can be initiated for a minimum of 3 years lock-in period. Once the lock-in period ends, the investors have the choice to re-invest or sell their equities. Also, ELSS attracts tax deductions up to INR 1.5 lakh. However, before you choose to invest in ELSS, make sure you check the risks involved.
Recurring Deposit (RD)
Looking for a short-term savings-cum-investment plan? If so, a recurring deposit might be the ideal pick. A recurring deposit can be for as low as 6 months to as long as 10 years and can offer interest rates that can go as high as 8.05%3. On a monthly basis, you invest a fixed amount of money for a fixed period of time and receive fixed returns. Upon maturity, you can use this amount to fulfil your financial goals. You are free to choose a tenure depending on your preference.
Conclusion
In a world where a lot of people seek instant gratification, there are many investment plans that may tempt you with an assurance to multiply for money. Do the required research and choose the investment plans for 3 years. 3-year investment options would be an ideal way to create wealth and make the use of the short-term.
Disclaimer:
The views stated in this article are not to be construed as investment advice and readers are suggested to seek independent financial advice before making any investment decisions. For more details on risk factors, terms and conditions please read the sales brochure & policy document (available on www.bajajallianzlife.com) carefully before concluding a sale. https://www.livemint.com/money/personal-finance/3-recurring-deposits-of-2-years-promising-over-8-returns-to-senior-citizens-11662974125525.html
